title: inga ciliata
intro: Inga ciliata, also known as the "red inga tree," is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is native to tropical regions of Central and South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Inga ciliata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies and traditional medicine.
